# Phase 4.5: Design Source of Truth (DESIGN.md)

Generate a `DESIGN.md` file at `{systemPath}/DESIGN.md` so the design artifact always lives beside the generated design-system work it describes.

## 4.5.1 DESIGN.md Structure

```markdown
# Design System: {productName}

> Auto-generated by Design Farmer. Phase 8 reviewers reference this file for calibration.
> This file is additive — updates append, never overwrite.

## Config
<!-- Auto-generated by Design Farmer. Required for re-entry (Phase 0 → Phase 5 shortcut). -->
```yaml
packageManager: {pnpm|npm|yarn|bun}
framework: {next-app-router|next-pages-router|vite-react|astro|sveltekit|nuxt|remix}
isMonorepo: {true|false}
systemPath: {systemPath}
designSystemPackage: "{designSystemPackage}"
componentScope: {foundation|core|full|custom}
headlessLibrary: {radix|base-ui|ark|headless-ui|melt|bits|none}
themeStrategy: {light-dark|light-only|multi-brand|custom}
themeLibrary: {next-themes|astro-color-scheme|remix-themes|mode-watcher|@nuxtjs/color-mode|custom|none}
accessibilityLevel: {aa|aaa|apca}
targetPlatforms: {web|web-native|web-hybrid|multi-platform}
designMaturity: {greenfield|emerging|mature}
maturityScore: {0-10}
```

---

## 1. Visual Theme & Atmosphere

{2–3 paragraphs describing the design personality, target context, aesthetic mood, and key visual metaphor.
Reference exact token values inline with backticks.}

**Key Characteristics:**
- Background base: `{--surface-default value}` (light) / `{--surface-default dark value}` (dark)
- Primary font: {font family with any OpenType features}
- Brand accent: `{--interactive-primary value}`
- Border style: `{--border-default value}`

---

## 2. Color Palette & Roles

### Background Surfaces
- **Surface Default** (`{value}`): Main page/card background
- **Surface Subtle** (`{value}`): Secondary backgrounds, sidebars, inputs
- **Surface Inverse** (`{value}`): Dark surfaces for high-contrast elements

### Text & Content
- **Primary Text** (`{value}`): Main body copy, headings
- **Secondary Text** (`{value}`): Captions, metadata, helper text
- **Tertiary Text** (`{value}`): Placeholders, disabled labels
- **Inverse Text** (`{value}`): Text on dark/colored backgrounds

### Brand & Interactive
- **Interactive Primary** (`{value}`): CTAs, links, selected states
- **Interactive Primary Hover** (`{value}`): Hover state
- **Interactive Primary Active** (`{value}`): Pressed state
- **Interactive Text** (`{value}`): Brand-colored text

### Status
- **Success** (`{value}`): Positive feedback, confirmed states
- **Warning** (`{value}`): Caution states
- **Error** (`{value}`): Destructive actions, validation errors
- **Info** (`{value}`): Informational feedback

### Borders & Dividers
- **Border Subtle** (`{value}`): Low-emphasis dividers
- **Border Default** (`{value}`): Standard borders, input outlines
- **Border Strong** (`{value}`): High-emphasis borders, focus rings
- **Border Focus** (`{value}`): Keyboard focus indicator

### Shadows
- **Shadow SM** (`{value}`): Subtle depth for cards
- **Shadow MD** (`{value}`): Dropdowns, popovers
- **Shadow LG** (`{value}`): Modals, dialogs

---

## 3. Typography Rules

### Font Family
- **Primary**: `{font}`, fallback: `{system-ui stack}`
- **Monospace**: `{font}`, fallback: `{mono stack}`

### Hierarchy

| Role | Size | Weight | Line Height | Letter Spacing |
|------|------|--------|-------------|----------------|
| Display | 36px | 700 | 1.10 | -0.03em |
| Heading 1 | 30px | 600 | 1.20 | -0.02em |
| Heading 2 | 24px | 600 | 1.25 | -0.01em |
| Heading 3 | 20px | 600 | 1.30 | normal |
| Heading 4 | 18px | 600 | 1.35 | normal |
| Body Large | 16px | 400 | 1.60 | normal |
| Body | 14px | 400 | 1.50 | normal |
| Small | 12px | 400 | 1.40 | normal |
| Code | 13px | 400 | 1.60 | normal |

### Typography Principles
{Explain the weight/size/tracking rationale — why these specific values serve the design intent.}

---

## 4. Component Stylings

### Buttons

**Primary Button** — `variant="primary"`
- Background: `{--interactive-primary}`
- Text: `{--text-inverse}`
- Padding: `{height × padding × font-size per size variant}`
- Border-radius: `{--button-radius}`
- Hover: `{--interactive-primary-hover}`
- Active: `{--interactive-primary-active}`
- Disabled: `opacity: 40%`

**Secondary Button** — `variant="secondary"`
- Background: `{--interactive-bg}`
- Text: `{--interactive-text}`
- Border: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px {--border-default}`

**Ghost Button** — `variant="ghost"`
- Background: transparent
- Text: `{--interactive-text}`
- Hover background: `{--interactive-bg}`

**Outline Button** — `variant="outline"`
- Background: transparent
- Border: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px {--border-default}`
- Text: `{--text-primary}`

**Destructive/Error Button** — `variant="error"`
- Background: `{--state-error}`
- Text: white
- Hover: `{--state-error-hover}`

**Size Scale:**
| Size | Height | Padding X | Font Size |
|------|--------|-----------|-----------|
| x-small | 24px | 8px | 12px |
| small | 28px | 10px | 12px |
| medium | 32px | 12px | 14px |
| large | 36px | 16px | 14px |

### Inputs & Forms

**Text Input** (normal state)
- Background: `{--surface-default}`
- Border: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px {--border-default}, {--shadow-sm}` (box-shadow approach, not CSS border)
- Padding: size-dependent
- Focus: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px {--border-focus}, {--shadow-sm}`
- Error: `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px {--state-error}`
- Disabled: `opacity: 40%, cursor: not-allowed`
- Placeholder: `{--text-disabled}`

> **Why box-shadow for borders?** Using `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px` instead of CSS `border` prevents layout shift when switching between default/focus/error states (no width change).

**CSS tokens to define in tokens.css:**
```css
--input-shadow:       0 0 0 1px var(--border-default), var(--shadow-sm);
--input-shadow-focus: 0 0 0 1px var(--border-focus), var(--shadow-sm);
--input-shadow-error: 0 0 0 1px var(--state-error), var(--shadow-sm);
```

### Cards & Containers

**Elevated Card**
- Background: `{--surface-default}`
- Shadow: `{--shadow-sm}`
- Border-radius: `{--card-radius}`

**Outlined Card**
- Background: `{--surface-default}`
- Border: `1px solid {--border-default}`
- Border-radius: `{--card-radius}`

**Filled Card**
- Background: `{--surface-subtle}`
- Border-radius: `{--card-radius}`

Card sub-components: CardHeader (border-bottom, subtle bg), CardTitle (semibold, primary text), CardDescription (secondary text), CardContent (padding), CardFooter (border-top, flex end)

### Badges

| Variant | Background | Text |
|---------|-----------|------|
| default | `{--surface-subtle}` | `{--text-secondary}` |
| success | `{--state-success}/15%` | `{--state-success}` |
| warning | `{--state-warning}/15%` | `{--state-warning-text}` |
| error | `{--state-error}/15%` | `{--state-error}` |
| info | `{--state-info}/15%` | `{--state-info}` |

Shape: `border-radius: 9999px` (pill)

### Dialog / Modal

- Backdrop: `oklch(0 0 0 / 0.4)`
- Popup: `{--surface-default}`, `{--shadow-xl}`, `border-radius: {--dialog-radius}`
- Max widths: small 380px, medium 520px, large 680px
- Width: `w-full max-w-[Xpx]` (responsive, not fixed width)
- Animation: scale + rotateX 3D entrance from `perspective(1200px) rotateX(-2deg) scale(0.995)` to `rotateX(0) scale(1)`
- Close button: top-right, size-6

### Overlay (Popover / Tooltip / Dropdown)

- Background: `{--surface-default}`
- Border: `1px solid {--border-subtle}`
- Shadow: `{--shadow-md}`
- Border-radius: `{--popover-radius}`
- Animation: fade + translateY(-4px) entrance

### Toast / Notification

- Use Sonner library (`sonner` package) — not a custom implementation
- Mount once at app root: `<Toaster position="bottom-right" richColors closeButton />`
- Style via CSS tokens: `borderRadius: var(--toast-radius)`, `fontFamily: var(--font-family-sans)`
- Surface colors: `--normal-bg: var(--surface-default)`, `--normal-border: var(--border-default)`

### Tabs

- Tab list: horizontal scrollable, `border-bottom: 1px solid {--border-subtle}`
- Active tab: `color: {--text-primary}`, bottom border indicator `{--interactive-primary}`
- Inactive: `{--text-tertiary}`, hover `{--text-secondary}`
- Animation: sliding underline indicator

---

## 5. Layout Principles

### Spacing System
- Base unit: `4px`
- Scale: `2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 16, 20, 24, 32, 40, 48, 64` px

### Container & Grid
- Max content width: varies by page type
- Card gap: 16px
- Section vertical padding: 32–64px

### Whitespace Philosophy
{Explain the spacing rationale — how negative space creates hierarchy and rhythm.}

---

## 6. Depth & Elevation

| Level | Treatment | Use Case |
|-------|-----------|----------|
| Flat | No shadow | Page background, table rows |
| SM | `0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06)` | Cards, inputs |
| MD | `0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.08)` | Dropdowns, popovers |
| LG | `0 8px 24px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.12)` | Modals, drawers |
| XL | `0 16px 40px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.16)` | Spotlight dialogs |
| Focus | `0 0 0 3px {--border-focus / 30%}` | Keyboard focus ring |

---

## 7. Do's and Don'ts

### Do
- Use `box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px` for interactive element borders (no layout shift on state change)
- Use semantic tokens (`--text-primary`, not `--color-neutral-900`) in components
- Use CSS `:hover` and `:active` for interactive states — not JS event handlers
- Use named React imports: `import { forwardRef, useId } from "react"` — not `import React from "react"`
- Use `ComponentProps<typeof X>` for extending component props
- Use `oklch()` for all color values — never hex or hsl in token definitions
- Verify APCA contrast Lc ≥ 60 for all text/surface pairs

### Don't
- Don't use `React.FC`, `React.ReactNode`, `React.ElementRef` (use imported types)
- Don't use `import * as React from "react"` (use named imports)
- Don't hardcode color values in components (always use semantic tokens)
- Don't use CSS `border` on inputs/selects (use box-shadow to avoid layout shift)
- Don't use inline `style={{}}` for component styling (use your project's styling approach — Tailwind classes, CSS Modules, or CSS custom properties)
- Don't use JS state (onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave) for hover/active — use CSS :hover/:active
- Don't use primitive tokens in components (`--color-blue-500`, only `--interactive-primary`)

---

## 8. Responsive Behavior

### Breakpoints
| Name | Width | Key Changes |
|------|-------|-------------|
| Mobile | < 640px | Single column, stacked layouts |
| Tablet | 640–1024px | Two-column, condensed nav |
| Desktop | > 1024px | Full layout, expanded nav |

### Touch Targets
- Minimum tap target: `44×44px`
- Buttons scale to minimum height at all sizes

### Collapsing Strategy
- Navigation: horizontal → hamburger at mobile
- Card grids: multi-column → single column
- Dialog: `w-full max-w-[Xpx]` with horizontal margin on mobile

---

## 9. Agent Prompt Guide

### Quick Token Reference
- Primary action background: `var(--interactive-primary)`
- Page background: `var(--surface-default)`
- Card background: `var(--surface-default)` or `var(--surface-subtle)`
- Primary text: `var(--text-primary)`
- Secondary text: `var(--text-secondary)`
- Border default: `var(--border-default)`
- Error state: `var(--state-error)`
- Focus ring: `var(--border-focus)`

### Example Component Prompts
- "Create a card: `--surface-default` bg, `--border-default` outline, `--card-radius`, `CardHeader` with `--surface-subtle` + `--border-subtle` bottom, `CardContent` with `--card-padding`"
- "Create a primary button: `--interactive-primary` bg, `--text-inverse` text, hover `--interactive-primary-hover`, active `--interactive-primary-active`"
- "Create an input: box-shadow `--input-shadow`, focus `--input-shadow-focus`, error `--input-shadow-error`, placeholder `--text-disabled`"

### Iteration Guide
1. Always reference semantic tokens, never raw color values
2. When adding a new component, follow existing size variant naming: `x-small | small | medium | large`
3. Match border approach: box-shadow for interactive outlines, CSS border for structural dividers
4. Test hover/focus/active/disabled states in both light and dark themes
5. Verify APCA Lc ≥ 60 for any new text/background pair
```

## 4.5.2 Generation

For greenfield projects (`designMaturity = GREENFIELD`) where many placeholder values are uncertain,
reference `examples/DESIGN.md` (Nova UI example) for concrete default values.
Use its OKLCH colors, typography scale, spacing values, and component specs as a starting point —
replace them with the user's brand color and any choices made in Phases 1–4.

```
Generate DESIGN.md at {systemPath}/DESIGN.md following the structure above.
Populate with:
- Aesthetic direction from Phase 1 interview responses
- Color rationale from Phase 3 OKLCH extraction results
- Typography choices from Phase 3 extraction
- Spacing philosophy from Phase 3 extraction
- Component design principles from Phase 4 architecture
- Theming decisions from Phase 4b (theme strategy, dark mode, styling approach)
- Decisions log from all user interactions (Phases 1-4b)

Read DesignFarmerConfig from {systemPath}/.design-farmer/config.json
Read extraction results from Phase 3 output (colors, typography, spacing)
Read architecture decisions from Phase 4 output (token hierarchy, component architecture)
Read theming decisions from Phase 4b output (theme strategy, provider pattern, dark mode, styling approach)
```

## 4.5.3 Subsequent Run Behavior

If DESIGN.md already exists:
1. Read the existing file
2. Append new entries to the Decisions Log
3. Update sections that have changed (color, typography, spacing)
4. Preserve the history — never delete past decisions
5. Add a `## Revision History` section if not present:

```
## Revision History
| Date | Action | Sections Changed |
|------|--------|-----------------|
| {date} | Initial generation | All |
| {date} | Updated palette | Color System, Decisions Log |
```

## 4.5.4 Phase 8 Integration

Update Phase 8 reviewer prompts to include:

```
"Before evaluating, read DESIGN.md at {systemPath}/DESIGN.md.
Calibrate your review against the documented design decisions.
Flag any implementation that deviates from the documented direction as HIGH severity."
```

**Status: DONE** — DESIGN.md generated and saved as the persistent design source of truth. Proceed to Phase 5: Token Implementation.
